rows.requirement: Fixed-size chunker with real, non-arbitrary size/overlap tuning
rows.validation: test_chunk_document_* unit tests (word-snapping, overlap correctness, invalid-overlap ValueError); select_chunk_config grid-search sweep recorded in self-consistency.json with full per-candidate recall numbers; shipped DEFAULT_* constants equal the sweep's winning config

rows.requirement: Real embedding-based retrieval step (not keyword/BM25 stand-in)
rows.validation: OllamaEmbeddingClient calls real local nomic-embed-text via /api/embed; VectorRagIndex.search ranks by real cosine similarity over those embeddings; live test asserts real (non-mocked) embeddings used

rows.requirement: Local-only, no paid API, no new pip dependency
rows.validation: OllamaEmbeddingClient uses httpx (existing dep) against localhost:11434; no OpenRouter/Gemini import anywhere in new files; agents/pyproject.toml left unmodified

rows.requirement: Test spec: pytest agents/eval/test_vector_rag_baseline.py runs retrieval against fixture corpus + fixture queries, asserts reasonable recall on known-relevant chunks
rows.validation: test_vector_rag_baseline.py's live recall test builds index from fixture corpus, retrieves per fixture query, asserts mean recall@3 >= 0.75

rows.requirement: Compatible with existing RawDocument / ground-truth shapes for future combined-benchmark wiring
rows.validation: chunk_document accepts plain (doc_id, text) matching RawDocument.id/.text; retrieve_documents returns ranked doc_id strings matching RelevantDoc.doc_id shape

rows.requirement: No live large-scale benchmark execution against real synthetic-PDF/Bitext/Enron corpora
rows.validation: No import of agents/eval/datasets.py or data/synthetic_corpus/ anywhere in new files; fixture corpus is self-contained inline test data only

rows.requirement: Fails closed (skip), not silently mocked, if local Ollama/embedding model unavailable
rows.validation: pytestmark skipif mirroring test_e2e_smoke.py's established convention, checked via /api/tags for nomic-embed-text presence
